goal: Quick Pull (single-card Ask-a-Question) poster: render as a Daily-style ceremonial poster — big card + reading underneath, no energy radar
done: Added module-level renderQuickPullPoster() in share/poster.js — a Daily-style single-card layout: localized topic headline (current locale only) + gold rule + 'Ask a Question' eyebrow → big card with warm radial aura → 'Answer · <orientation>' gold badge → big italic-serif card name (EN, interim rule) → gold diamond ornament → the topic-aware reading (resolveQuestionPosterSummaries present slot) fitted via fitDailyQuoteText. The question/story branch now early-returns to it when isSinglePull (questionCardCount===1) BEFORE the 3-card layout + energy radar, so the radar never runs for single-pull. Daily branch untouched; 3-card Story spread untouched (still Past/Present/Future + radar). Also localized the question-poster eyebrow at source (getQuestionPosterStrings: hardcoded 'Ask a Question' -> dict.questionTitle, EN/TH) — fixes the eyebrow half of the EN-only parity gap for both poster modes.
verified: Harness render (chrome-devtools MCP, question-harness-single.html, 1080x1920) EN+TH: single card big+aura, topic headline in current locale only (EN 'Love' / TH 'ความรัก', no cross-language leak), eyebrow localized (TH 'ถามคำถาม'), 'Answer'/'คำตอบ' badge (shadow added for legibility), card name EN, reading underneath in correct locale, NO radar. 3-card harness re-rendered EN — no regression (Past/Present/Future + radar intact). Card art = fallback gradient (CDN CORS-blocked on localhost) — real card art still needs an on-device pass.
